name: WAR OPERATION™ : Full Contact
short_description: Iraq, April 2003, in the midst of a frighteningly intense confrontation. Iraqi army against the U.S. Marines, take your class, your weapons and run through Baghdad streets, near Firdos Square, frozen in the days of Saddam Hussein's regime. A unique and exceptional experience never seen before.
detailed_description:
Early Beta Access

The first version of Early Access sends you straight back to April 2003, in the heart of Iraq, in the midst of a frighteningly intense confrontation. Scoot around the streets of Baghdad, near Firdos Square, frozen in the days of Saddam Hussein's regime. A unique and exceptional experience never seen before.


About the Game

Iraq, April 2003 - The United States and its allies launch Operation Iraqi Freedom, supposedly to rid the country of weapons of mass destruction and toppling from its dictator Saddam Hussein. In the wake of the devastating 9/11 attacks, President George W. Bush is determined to seek historic revenge against what he calls the Axis of Evil.

From the streets of Baghdad to the rugged mountains of Tora Bora, WAR OPERATION™: Full Contact thrusts you into the heart of the most intense modern conflicts.

A museum-grade reconstruction of Baghdad’s historic Firdos Square and many other key locations immerses you in a truly unique and powerful experience.

WAR OPERATION™: Full Contact, in its very first early access version, offers 16-versus-16 game modes: Team Deathmatch, Zone Capture, Rescue, and Statue-Toppling modes - all set across stunning and realistic modern-day environments in a fast-paced third-person shooter experience.

Technical features of Early Access - First Version

  • 1 iconic map: Firdos Square

  • 2 camps: The American marines against the Iraqi Army including the Fedayeen.

  • 4 gamemodes : Team deathmatch, Zone control, Rescue, Toppling mode

  • Integrated online chat

  • Online Ranking

  • A unique soundtrack

  • Dynamic gameplay and characters movements

  • Dynamic sound system

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Russian, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
